summary: Iteration 233 — Verified the BUG-FIX that excludes REVERSED/CANCELLED rows from totals/subtotals and strikes their ₹ figures on the row, in BOTH (a) Stock Out (Distributor → Customer) [DeliveriesTab.jsx] and (b) Promotional Stock-Out (Delivery Challan) [PromoDispatchSection.jsx]. Logged in as CEO surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth, opened Brian DIST-0003 → Stock Out tab. Seeded one REVERSED row in each table via API (reverse endpoint requires acknowledge=true query param) so a reversed row sits alongside live rows in the same date group. STOCK OUT: reversed DEL-2026-0027 on 2026-06-24 → row container carries `opacity-60 bg-rose-50/30`, status badge reads 'Reversed', and 5 financial spans (Billing ₹100.00, Net Billing ₹100.00, Margin ₹2.50, Billable ₹97.50, Net Billable ₹97.50) all carry `line-through decoration-rose-400 decoration-2`. delivery-date-subtotal-2026-06-24 displays '6 deliveries · 1 reversed' with Billing ₹250.00 / Net Billing ₹250.00 / Margin ₹6.25 / Billable ₹243.75 / Net Billable ₹243.75 — verified arithmetically: each column excludes the reversed row's amount (sum of the 6 live rows in the group). deliveries-totals-row shows 'Totals · 9 deliveries' (i.e. 10 − 1 reversed) and grand totals Billing ₹450, Margin ₹11.25, Billable ₹438.75, Net Billable ₹-11.25 — which equals 0(Today)+243.75(24-Jun)+97.50(23-Jun)+97.50(22-Jun)−450(Today CN) = ₹-11.25, fully reconciling with the per-date subtotals and confirming the reversed amount is also excluded from the grand total. PROMO: reversed DC-2606-0001 on 2026-06-04 → row carries `opacity-60 bg-slate-50`, the Crates badge ('3') and Indicative Value cell ('₹60.00') both have line-through, status badge reads 'Reversed', zoho cell shows 'deleted'. promo-date-subtotal-2026-06-04 shows total quantity 6 (=1+1+2+2 live rows, excludes 3 from reversed), total indicative value ₹151.00 (=0+20+40+91, excludes ₹60), and '4 challans · 1 reversed'. Regression: live (non-reversed) rows still render normally with no line-through and are fully counted; collapse/expand on group headers continues to gate per-date subtotal rendering as before (open group ⇒ subtotal in DOM). All review criteria pass.

design_issues.screen: Distributor Detail > Stock Out grand-total footer
issues: Negative Net Billable still rendered as '₹-11.25' / '₹-450.00' (minus AFTER ₹). Pre-existing cosmetic inconsistency, NOT introduced by this fix — same flag was raised in iteration_230.

critical_code_review_comments: DeliveriesTab.jsx L32 VOIDED_DELIVERY_STATUSES=['reversed','cancelled'] is the single source of truth — sumDeliveries (L38-58) early-returns inside its forEach when status is voided, and the per-row isVoided check (L1794) uses the same constant. Good: subtotal and grand-total math, row strike-through, and the live-count text all stay in lockstep. If any new void-equivalent status is added later (e.g. 'voided'), only this array needs updating.

DeliveriesTab.jsx L1971/L1990 phrase 'X deliveries · N reversed' is technically inaccurate if a CANCELLED delivery is later introduced (the constant accepts both 'reversed' and 'cancelled' but the visible suffix only says 'reversed'). Today there are no 'cancelled' rows in the dataset so this is cosmetic; consider renaming to 'voided' or computing the suffix from the actual statuses present in the group. Non-blocking.

PromoDispatchSection.jsx L802-810 uses an inline `d.status !== 'reversed'` filter instead of a shared constant. This works because the promo flow has no 'cancelled' state, but it diverges from the DeliveriesTab pattern. Extracting a small `VOIDED_PROMO_STATUSES` constant would mirror DeliveriesTab and make a future addition (e.g. promo cancellation) a one-line change. Non-blocking.
PromoDispatchSection.jsx L651/L653 apply line-through only when `d.status === 'reversed'` — consistent with the subtotal filter, so per-row visual and subtotal arithmetic remain in sync. Good.

Both files render the strike-through via Tailwind's `line-through decoration-rose-400 decoration-2` (Stock Out) and `line-through decoration-rose-400 decoration-2` (Promo). Visual is clear in the screenshots; rose decoration colour reads well against the row's `bg-rose-50/30` (Stock Out) / `bg-slate-50` (Promo) backgrounds.

success_rate.backend: n/a (frontend-only run, used API only to seed reversed rows)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on all 5 review criteria (row styling, status badge, subtotal exclusion, grand-total exclusion, regression on live rows + collapse/expand)

test_credentials: CEO surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth / test123 (Tenant nyla-air-water). Distributor: Brian DIST-0003 (id bb12d90e-4d33-4890-ac5f-17573c551b5c).
seed_data_creation: Reversed two existing transactions on Brian DIST-0003 to enable side-by-side comparison in the same date group: (1) POST /api/distributors/{id}/deliveries/592ba66c-6635-4848-bd1c-7ab0da40ff01/reverse?acknowledge=true&reason=TEST → DEL-2026-0027 on 2026-06-24 is now status='reversed' (stock reservation released, no Zoho impact since it was 'confirmed'). (2) POST /api/distributors/{id}/promo-deliveries/a3b72c6d-8467-42ad-b292-1b08bed596b1/reverse?acknowledge=true → DC-2606-0001 on 2026-06-04 is now status='reversed' (Zoho challan deleted, stock returned). These two reversed rows remain in the dataset and can be reused by future regression runs without re-seeding.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The reverse endpoints take `acknowledge` as a QUERY PARAM (not body) — `POST /api/distributors/{id}/deliveries/{deliveryId}/reverse?acknowledge=true&reason=...`. Same for promo. Without acknowledge=true the server returns 400 'past draft — confirm reversal explicitly'. Both reversed rows from this run (DEL-2026-0027 and DC-2606-0001) are persisted, so subsequent testing agents do NOT need to re-seed — just expand 2026-06-24 (Stock Out) and 2026-06-04 (Promo) date groups to see them. Only Today is open by default; data-testids: delivery-date-group-{YYYY-MM-DD}, delivery-date-subtotal-{YYYY-MM-DD}, deliveries-totals-row, delivery-row-{id}, promo-date-group-{YYYY-MM-DD}, promo-date-subtotal-{YYYY-MM-DD}, promo-dispatch-row-{id}, promo-status-{id}. Stock Out reversed-row visual: row class contains `opacity-60 bg-rose-50/30`; financial spans contain `line-through decoration-rose-400 decoration-2`. Promo reversed-row visual: row class contains `opacity-60 bg-slate-50`; Crates badge and Indicative Value cell carry the same line-through classes. Subtotal count text format: '{liveCount} deliveries · {n} reversed' and '{liveCount} challans · {n} reversed'.
rca of the issue: N/A — this run validated the FIX, not a bug. The fix correctness was confirmed both visually (line-through + dim row background + Reversed badge) and arithmetically (per-date subtotals and grand-total footer = sum of only the live rows, excluding the reversed row's ₹ figures and from the count). Implementation hinges on (a) DeliveriesTab.jsx module constant VOIDED_DELIVERY_STATUSES=['reversed','cancelled'] used both in sumDeliveries() early-return and in the per-row isVoided check, ensuring row visual + subtotal + grand total stay consistent; and (b) PromoDispatchSection.jsx inline `d.status !== 'reversed'` filter applied identically to subtotal totalQ/totalV and the live-challan count, matched by per-row line-through gating on the same status check.
